name: Titan SBI Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under Titan SBI Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Spend-based reversal of renewal fee on annual spends of Rs 3 lakh or more
Additional benefits worth Rs 5,000 on annual spends of Rs 5 lakh
Additional benefits worth Rs 10,000 on annual spends of Rs 10 lakh
additionalBenefits: 7.5% cashback on World of Titan, Taneira, Titan Eye+, Helios, Fastrack, Skinn, Irth and Sonata spends
5% cashback on Mia, CaratLane and Zoya spends
3% value back on Tanishq spends in the form of gift vouchers
6 Reward Points per Rs 100 on other eligible categories outside the Titan ecosystem
4 Reward Points equal Re 1 for eligible reward redemption
8 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year, capped at 2 per quarter
4 complimentary international lounge visits per year, capped at 2 per quarter
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions
